main_metrics: Trigger rate, false trigger rate, miss rate, MAPE
summary: False triggers reach about 45% at tau_c = 0.3; best MAPE of 3.2% occurs near tau_c = 0.7; small-target misses rise to 38% at tau_c = 0.9.
1 cm raises runtime beyond 120 ms; 2 cm gives the best porous-target MAPE of 1.9%; 10 cm increases MAPE to 14.5%.
1x cannot close meshes reliably; 2.5x gives best boundary accuracy (MAPE 2.1%); 5x tends toward a convex hull and raises MAPE to 7.8%.
lambda = 0.75 gives the lowest ECE (0.038); lambda = 1.0 can over-suppress valid TOF points and create artificial holes.

main_metrics: Peak temperature, queue length, drop rate
summary: Low V keeps temperature near 65 C but allows queue backlog of 12 tasks; medium V keeps temperature near 68 C and queue length near 2; high V approaches 78 C.
